title: Consistency bootstrap for a symbolic target observable
research_question: Which auditable self-consistency constraints yield the strongest reproducible bound on a symbolic target observable under a laptop-feasible setup?
strategy_notes: Start from a baseline representation, formalize assumptions as typed artifacts, and add one constraint family at a time so every improvement is attributable and reproducible.

evaluation_metrics.description: Reproduce the baseline result under identical assumptions before enabling any new constraint.
evaluation_metrics.target: Baseline artifact reproduces within the declared tolerance envelope.

evaluation_metrics.description: Measure whether the added constraint changes the bound or falsifies the proposed direction in a reproducible way.
evaluation_metrics.target: At least one auditable delta or a justified kill decision.

next_actions: Extract the baseline definitions and typed assumptions from the seed sources.
Specify the first closure constraint and the exact artifact needed to audit it.
Add a numerics validation plan before any heavier backend is introduced.

key_artifacts.description: Per-island plan artifact used by validate-project to enforce required structure.
